recommendations.title: Mackenna's Gold
recommendations.overview: A bandit kidnaps a Marshal who has seen a map showing a gold vein on Indian lands, but other groups are looking for it too, while the Apache try to keep the secret location undisturbed.

recommendations.title: Firewalker
recommendations.overview: A pair of adventurers try to track down an ancient Aztec/Mayan/Egyptian/Apache horde of gold.

recommendations.title: Cape Fear
recommendations.overview: Sam Bowden witnesses a rape committed by Max Cady and testifies against him. When released after 8 years in prison, Cady begins stalking Bowden and his family but is always clever enough not to violate the law.

recommendations.title: Death Wish 4: The Crackdown
recommendations.overview: After the death of his girlfriend's daughter from a drug overdose, Paul Kersey takes on the local drug cartel.

recommendations.title: Murphy's Law
recommendations.overview: A tough police detective escapes from custody after being framed and arrested for the murder of his ex-wife, and must now find the real killer and prove his innocence.

recommendations.title: Spirit Untamed
recommendations.overview: Lucky Prescott's life is changed forever when she moves from her home in the city to a small frontier town and befriends a wild mustang named Spirit.

recommendations.title: The Evil That Men Do
recommendations.overview: A former assassin (Charles Bronson) comes out of retirement to avenge the brutal murder of his friend at the hands of a sadistic torturer (Joseph Maher) employed by an oppressive foreign dictatorship.

recommendations.title: The Guns of Navarone
recommendations.overview: A team of allied saboteurs are assigned an impossible mission: infiltrate an impregnable Nazi-held island and destroy the two enormous long-range field guns that prevent the rescue of 2,000 trapped British soldiers.

recommendations.title: Conquest of the Planet of the Apes
recommendations.overview: In a futuristic world that has embraced ape slavery, a chimpanzee named Caesar resurfaces after almost twenty years of hiding from the authorities, and prepares for a revolt against humanity.

recommendations.title: Dances with Wolves
recommendations.overview: Wounded Civil War soldier John Dunbar tries to commit suicide—and becomes a hero instead. As a reward, he's assigned to his dream post, a remote junction on the Western frontier, and soon makes unlikely friends with the local Sioux tribe.
